prompt.content:
Revise the S&P Global (Consolidated Entity) DCF as follows: 
1.	Change period to mid-year adjustment
2.	Under Cost of Capital Assumptions change the following:
a.	Update risk free rate to 10 year treasury rate at close on 01/07/2026
b.	Change tax rate to 23%
c.	Update share price to closing price on 01/07/2026

Calculate and output the revised Shareholder Equity Value Creation - $ and Shareholder Equity Value Creation - %.
Round $ values to millions in 0 decimal places and % values to 1 decimal place.

rubrics.name: States the revised Shareholder Equity Value Creation - $ is $2,281 million... (ver_e4621ec704be4264aa472f60fa2c06d2)

messages.content: States the revised Shareholder Equity Value Creation - $ is $2,281 million (acceptable range $2,258 to $2,304).

rubrics.name: States the revised Shareholder Equity Value Creation - % is 1.7% (acceptable... (ver_ef413710889545809cacb1311defc9cc)

messages.content: States the revised Shareholder Equity Value Creation - % is 1.7% (acceptable range 1.68% to 1.72%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
1.	The revised Shareholder Equity Value Creation - $ is $2,281 million
2.	The revised Shareholder Equity Value Creation - % is 1.7%
